design_context: Mobile-first Web App (PWA) / Utility App for outdoor agriculture tracking. Designed for gloved usage in high-glare sunlight.

rules.legibility: Use tabular nums for all quantities (L/ha, kg, ha) to ensure decimals align properly.

spacing_and_layout.touch_targets: CRITICAL: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, list items) MUST have a minimum height of 56px (h-14). No exceptions.
spacing_and_layout.padding: Generous internal padding to prevent mis-taps. Screen padding default: p-4 or p-6.
spacing_and_layout.grid: grid-cols-1 for most forms. 2-column grids only for paired metrics (e.g., Area vs. Dose).
spacing_and_layout.surface_strategy: Solid flat cards. NO glassmorphism, NO heavy shadows. Use 1px sharp borders (border-stone-300) with subtle ambient shadow (shadow-sm) for depth against pure white backgrounds.

buttons.primary: bg-emerald-700 text-white min-h-[56px] rounded-xl font-bold text-lg active:bg-emerald-800 active:scale-[0.98] transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-stone-100 text-stone-900 border-2 border-stone-200 min-h-[56px] rounded-xl font-bold text-lg active:bg-stone-200
buttons.destructive: bg-red-600 text-white min-h-[56px] rounded-xl font-bold text-lg active:bg-red-700

inputs.text_and_number: min-h-[56px] border-2 border-stone-300 rounded-xl px-4 text-lg font-bold bg-white focus:border-emerald-700 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-emerald-200
inputs.select: min-h-[56px] border-2 border-stone-300 rounded-xl px-4 text-lg font-bold bg-white

cards.dashboard_metric: p-5 bg-white border border-stone-200 rounded-2xl shadow-sm flex flex-col gap-2
cards.list_item: p-4 bg-white border-b border-stone-200 flex justify-between items-center active:bg-stone-50 min-h-[72px]

navigation.bottom_tab_bar: fixed bottom-0 w-full h-20 bg-white border-t border-stone-200 flex justify-around items-center pb-2 z-50
navigation.tab_item: flex flex-col items-center justify-center w-full h-full gap-1 text-stone-500 active:text-emerald-700 data-[active=true]:text-emerald-700 font-semibold text-xs

icons.size: Minimum 28px (w-7 h-7) for main actions, 24px (w-6 h-6) for list items. Stroke width 2.5 for better visibility in sunlight.
icons.usage: Use thick, clear icons. No delicate thin lines.

hero_backgrounds.description: Close up of brown wheat field for app loading/splash screen

empty_states.description: Green tractor in field, used when no treatments are recorded yet

accessibility.contrast: Must exceed WCAG AA 4.5:1. Use deep greens and blacks against pure white.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='new-treatment-button', data-testid='dashboard-tab').

instructions_to_main_agent: Build this as an Android-first Mobile Web App (PWA) using React + Tailwind + Shadcn.
CRITICAL: The UI will be used outdoors by French farmers, potentially with gloves. Do NOT use standard small web inputs. Enforce min-h-[56px] for all buttons, inputs, and list items.
Do NOT use glassmorphism or low-contrast text. Everything must be highly visible in direct sunlight.
All text MUST be in French.
Implement bottom tab navigation fixed to the bottom of the viewport.
Use standard HTML/Tailwind for layout wrappers, customize Shadcn inputs/selects heavily to meet the 56px height requirement.
Ensure 'data-testid' is attached to every button, form field, and interactive list item.
